title: Fetish Weapons
description: Adds three weapons with.. suspicious.. origins.
body:
# **(DISCLAIMER: This mod features nasty language and intentionally overpowered weapons.)**

![Quite possibly one of the nastiest mods I've ever made.. SO FAR!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05a045ef6fe6e99490534a6c888522de42d73417.png)

**This mod adds three VERY OVERPOWERED weapons to the game. They were made for an ItsJim vidoe, but he never ended up using any of the mods, oh well.**

**Each weapon is based off of a suspicious piece of media, which one might find satisfaction in, despite the pushback.**

**It's quite possibly one of the nastiest mods I've ever made.... SO FAR!**



(The mods featured in the thumbnail are [Create: Estrogen](https://modrinth.com/mod/estrogen), [furry bohe](https://modrinth.com/mod/furry_bohe), and [Straw Statues](https://modrinth.com/mod/straw-statues).

(The transfur inventory textures included in this mod were originally from [Changed: Minecraft Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/changed-minecraft-mod). I DID NOT MAKE THOSE SPECIFICALLY. Now, I'm not saying you should go check it out, but you should definitely go check it out lowk. Give them a download or two, delete the file afterwards, whatever you want.)


# Content



![bohe blade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a500bebc1724bf8a24c897562de5e196b5c80f8.png)

**Bohe Blade**

- The **Bohe Blade** is a sword type weapon, inspired by the transfur crystals from Changed.

- Whatever is hit by it will get the **"Budding"** effect.

- Shift-right clicking will give the user the **"Extinctionator"** effect.

---------



![fenrir staff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a856a78ec26e28327bbc5c032a7e085a4d9a7721.png)

**Fenrir Staff**

- The **Fenrir Staff** is a staff weapon, inspired by the same one in the Grezzo 2 mod for Doom, just with a suspicious wolf skull instead, because it's "Fenrir".

- Whatever is hit with the weapon will get the **"Enslaved"** effect.

- When holding down right click, it will constantly fire out flaming projectiles.

- When shift-right clicking, it will slam down and fire the projectiles out in a circle around 
the user.

- Whatever is hit by the projectiles will get the **"Inseminated"** effect.

---------



![centrifuge laser](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/103908dde54d09cd2a3716158ac02ed6447c0934.png)

**Centrifuge Laser**

- The **Centrifuge Laser** is a laser gun, inspired by pieces from the Create: Estrogen mod.

- Right clicking will charge up for a second, and then fire out a laser.

- Whatever is hit will take extra damage depending on how fast it's moving.

- Whatever is hit with the laser will get the **"Realistic Girl Power"** effect.

---------


![gem of realism](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/822b535ae4fdb2476d1a3a27fd746e9e4a923fed.png)

**Gem of Realism**

- This is the item used to craft all 3 weapons.

- It can only be found in the stronghold crossing chest.

- Entities that die with the Budding effect active will also drop some of these.

---------
---------
---------
---------



![realistic girl power](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b66cd82199afdd5b9642349f9017204cc5372485.png)

**Realistic Girl Power**

- This effect does multiple unique things. Those being:

  - Poisoning the target when they eat certain items, like raw meat and rotten flesh.
  
  - Certain mobs with the effect will target the closest player and attack them, even if they couldn't otherwise.
  
  - Entities with the effect will take extra damage from all sources. (if damage bypasses armor, then (amount + 2), else (amount + (1 + armor of target)))
  
  - Entities with the effect will deal less damage. (amount ÷ 1.5)

---------



![enslaved](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29a18ef1a061b138ebe809fb69102278d64f772a.png)

**Enslaved**

 - Changes most of the hearts, hunger, etc. into animated static versions of them.
 
 - Even though you can't see it with the static, your health and hunger will be **VISUALLY** set to 1.
 
 - Entities that attack someone with this effect will directly gain health, hunger, saturation, and experience.

 - Players with this effect will be constantly set to adventure mode.

---------


![inseminated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77e5460c047f4b61c4ebadf0e9c55c1c96a11b5f.png)

**Inseminated**

 - Tilts the player's camera.
 
 - Reduces movement speed and makes the entity fall a lot faster.

---------



![budding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34d9c2a45ff483e67654cd6efe1686d1d7463510.png)

**Budding**

 - Makes the entity take constant damage every 30 ticks (1.5 seconds) because there are crystals growing inside of its body.

 - Entities with this effect will drop 1-4 **Gem of Realism**s if they die with it.

---------


![extinctionator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a5db2012ee46e9b3ecb5fb8f22b2c8677b7168a.png)

**Extinctionator**

 - Allows the player to dash, and jump multiple times in the air. (Reused mechanics from Michael Mayhem)

 - Also allows the player to activate elytra flight at will, even without one on. Yes, this works with fireworks.

 - The player can customize their fursona if they have this effect. (The changes remain even after the effect expires.)

---------
---------
---------
---------



![the model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bcd86fd920b13f7b8c4b31985e74f0c68b1d0cf.png)

**Furry player model**

- Just as a big middle finger to Essential and their many practices, I spent a couple days ripping and tearing the "furry bundle" assets, and porting them into my own mod. This one's the perfect mod to do it in, after all.

  - You can customize head, body, hand paws, feet paws, ears, and tail, including what color each have.
  - There is a unique model for slim and classic arm types.

  - Capes will still show up!!!


![customize menu gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/682bb9d2f246c9d0ea493e445f0907aff968cce6.png)


- Want some fun facts about Essential, and to be more specific, this furry bundle, that I found while ripping? No? Too bad.

  - People have conspired that "They're trying to turn java into bedrock!" This could not be more true, as every cosmetic model is in bedrock edition's entity format.

  - The "cool" and "cute" furry body assets are called "masc" and "fem" internally. I just knew those proportions weren't just for show!


---------
---------
---------
---------

**Music Discs**

- There are multiple music discs. Each one uses the following song:

  - [Cory in the House DS - White House](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zKLVKecv3u8)

  - [Cory in the House DS - Boss Fight](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9znLYuNaS40)

  - [Grezzo 2 soundtrack - Tu Sei La Mia﻿ Vita Remix](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2T6yhOpWEV0)

  - [Rob Zombie - Dragula](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EqQuihD0hoI)

  - [PRIME - ズットキットプライマリ音楽](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OlBDud0cMQg)

  - [Fight Against an Armed Boss (Alpha Version)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mpta3nEUflk)

  - [Brick By Brick, Suck My...](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=95_33ItUC9k)

---------
---------
---------
---------

Oh yea, it also adds some absolutely TUFF paintings. (onj)


![painting that's lowk tuff gng](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d422d157601c1801a0aa83fbd5d3b21688260121.png)
